title: How to enable only assigned user to change task status
excerpt:

posts.author: ryancqualls (Ryan Qualls)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all, digging into Monday to utilize a board as a digital production traveler.

My goal is to have only the task assignee have permission to change the task status (dropdown) from “Assigned” to "In Progress’ to “Completed” etc.

A simulation of a digital signature.

Is there a simple way to set cell permissions?

Any insight would be great. Cheers.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @ryancqualls!

Would this specific editting permission be suitable for you here?

Screen Shot 2023-01-24 at 1.45.16 pm1044×614 46 KB

Essentially, only the person assigned will be able to edit the associated columns.

Alternatively, you can also set up Column Permissions to ensure that only specific people have the ability to edit/view the column. Just to note, this feature is only available on our Pro + Enterprise plan.

Hope this helps!
